title: Password Management & Digital Safety
headline: Stop writing passwords on paper—secure them properly.
description: Professional password manager setup and digital safety services to protect online accounts using encrypted vaults, strong passphrases, and multi-factor authentication, serving Ocala, Belleview, The Villages, and surrounding Central Florida communities.
keywords: password manager setup The Villages FL

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Over 80 percent of data breaches are caused by weak, reused, or exposed passwords.
Passwords stored in browsers can often be stolen by malware or phishing pages without obvious warning.
Password managers store credentials in encrypted vaults and generate strong passphrases that are both secure and easier to remember.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraph: We help individuals and families replace risky password habits with secure, easy-to-use tools that protect their most important accounts.
items: Install and configure a trusted password manager with encrypted storage
Import and audit existing passwords for weak, reused, or compromised entries
Generate strong, memorable passphrases for critical accounts
Check credentials against known breach databases and assist with remediation

sections.heading: How It Works
paragraph: We begin with a short consultation to understand your current setup and security concerns.
Next, we install and configure your password manager and guide you through secure daily use.
You leave with full control of your accounts, confidence using your tools, and improved protection against password-related attacks.
items: Organize vaults and categories based on your needs
Learn safe sharing, backup, and recovery practices
